languages.text: {n}Кулак врезается в металлическую пластину в черепе Эоганна, не причинив вреда. Тервантьяс равнодушно наблюдает за вами.{/n} "Если ты думал{mf||а} таким образом поднять мне настроение, образец, то тебе не удалось".

{n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."
languages.original_text: {n}Кулак врезается в металлическую пластину в черепе Эоганна, не причинив вреда. Тервантьяс равнодушно наблюдает за вами.{/n} "Если ты думал{mf||а} таким образом поднять мне настроение, образец, то тебе не удалось".

{n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

languages.text: {n}Deine Faust trifft die Metallplatte in Eogunns Schädel, kann ihm aber nichts anhaben. Tervantias beobachtet dich mit offensichtlichem Desinteresse.{/n} "Falls Ihr dachtet, das würde mich amüsieren, Versuchsstück, habt Ihr Euch geirrt."
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Faust trifft die Metallplatte in Eogunns Schädel, kann ihm aber nichts anhaben. Tervantias beobachtet dich mit offensichtlichem Desinteresse.{/n} "Falls Ihr dachtet, das würde mich amüsieren, Versuchsstück, habt Ihr Euch geirrt."

languages.text: {n}Votre poing s'écrase sur la plaque de métal vissée dans le crâne d'Eogunn, sans lui faire le moindre mal. Tervantias vous toise avec indifférence.{/n} « Si vous pensiez que cela m'amuserait, spécimen, vous faites erreur. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre poing s'écrase sur la plaque de métal vissée dans le crâne d'Eogunn, sans lui faire le moindre mal. Tervantias vous toise avec indifférence.{/n} « Si vous pensiez que cela m'amuserait, spécimen, vous faites erreur. »

languages.text: {n}Tu puño golpea la placa de metal del cráneo de Eogunn sin infligir daño. Tervantias te observa con indiferencia.{/n} «Si creías que esto me divertiría, te equivocabas».
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu puño golpea la placa de metal del cráneo de Eogunn sin infligir daño. Tervantias te observa con indiferencia.{/n} «Si creías que esto me divertiría, te equivocabas».

languages.text: {n}Yumruğun, Eogunn'un kafatasındaki metal plakaya inerek ona zarar vermiyor. Tervantias seni kayıtsızlıkla izliyor.{/n} "Bunun beni eğlendireceğini sandıysan numune, yanıldın."
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yumruğun, Eogunn'un kafatasındaki metal plakaya inerek ona zarar vermiyor. Tervantias seni kayıtsızlıkla izliyor.{/n} "Bunun beni eğlendireceğini sandıysan numune, yanıldın."

languages.text: {n}你一拳砸在伊奥贡头骨的金属板上，他却毫发无伤。特万提亚斯极其冷漠地看着你。{/n}“样本，你若是觉得这样做能够取悦我，那你可就大错特错了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}你一拳砸在伊奥贡头骨的金属板上，他却毫发无伤。特万提亚斯极其冷漠地看着你。{/n}“样本，你若是觉得这样做能够取悦我，那你可就大错特错了。”

languages.text: {n}あなたの拳がエオガンの頭蓋の金属板に叩きつけられるが、彼は無傷のままだ。テルヴァンティアスはまったくの無関心であなたを見ている。{/n}「これで私が楽しむとでも思ったのなら、標本よ、貴様は当てが外れたな」
languages.original_text: {n}Your fist slams into the metal plate in Eogunn's skull, leaving him unharmed. Tervantias watches you with utter indifference.{/n} "If you thought this would amuse me, specimen, you have failed to do so."

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの拳がエオガンの頭蓋の金属板に叩きつけられるが、彼は無傷のままだ。テルヴァンティアスはまったくの無関心であなたを見ている。{/n}「これで私が楽しむとでも思ったのなら、標本よ、貴様は当てが外れたな」
